title: Assistant Store Manager - Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises:
Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises!
